summary: Iteration 138: Tested dual-photo capture feature for vehicle weight. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend VehicleWeight component renders correctly with live weight display, 2 camera panels, entry form, pending list, and completed entries table.
seed_data_creation: Created test entries during testing with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dual-photo capture features verified working: 1) POST /api/vehicle-weight creates entry with first_wt_front_img and first_wt_side_img saved to disk (filenames like {entry_id}_1st_front.jpg). 2) PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/second-weight saves second_wt_front_img and second_wt_side_img to disk (filenames like {entry_id}_2nd_front.jpg). 3) POST /api/vehicle-weight/auto-notify reads saved images from disk using entry.first_wt_front_img etc (NOT from req.body). WhatsApp/Telegram not configured in preview so returns 'WA: 0 sent, TG: 0 sent' which is expected. 4) GET /api/vehicle-weight lists entries with image filenames. 5) DELETE /api/vehicle-weight/{id} works correctly. 6) Frontend VehicleWeight component renders with: live weight display (simulator), 2 camera panels (Front/Side), entry form with all fields, pending vehicle list, completed entries table with edit/print/download/WA/group/delete actions.

features_tested.backend_create_with_first_weight_images: PASS - POST /api/vehicle-weight saves first_wt_front_img and first_wt_side_img to disk
features_tested.backend_create_without_images: PASS - Images are optional, empty string when not provided
features_tested.backend_second_weight_with_images: PASS - PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/second-weight saves second_wt_front_img and second_wt_side_img
features_tested.backend_auto_notify_reads_from_disk: PASS - POST /api/vehicle-weight/auto-notify reads images from entry fields, not req.body
features_tested.backend_next_rst: PASS - GET /api/vehicle-weight/next-rst returns next RST number
features_tested.backend_complete_flow: PASS - Create with images -> second weight with images -> auto-notify flow works
features_tested.frontend_vehicle_weight_page: PASS - VehicleWeight component renders with data-testid
features_tested.frontend_live_weight_display: PASS - Shows live weight from simulator (1,734 KG)
features_tested.frontend_camera_panels: PASS - 2 camera feed panels (Front View, Side View)
features_tested.frontend_entry_form: PASS - All form fields present (Date, Vehicle, Party, Farmer, Product, Trans Type, Pkts, Remark, Cash, Diesel, First Weight)
features_tested.frontend_save_button: PASS - Save First Weight button present
features_tested.frontend_pending_list: PASS - Pending Vehicle List card present
features_tested.frontend_completed_entries: PASS - Completed Entries table with 4 entries showing all columns
